Lore Item
Slot: HEAD
AC: 4
WT: 0.8 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Shestar's Scaled Coif
Lore Item
Slot: HEAD
AC: 4
WT: 0.8 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Kunark Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 2 gp 5 sp 0 cp
Tribute:4
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 05:05:31
Page Updated:Sat Jul 9th, 2011

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 1pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 7
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Shestar's Scaled Coif
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Shestar's Scaled Coif (Smithing, 23 trivial)
    • Class: ALL
    Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
    Yield: 1 x Shestar's Scaled Coif

Zone Name
Cabilis East

i like this thing.... with 4 ac nothin`s gettin threw!! (sarcasm) still it looks damn cool!

# Nov 04 2001 at 11:16 PM Rating: Default

48 posts
next time i make one Bobete, i'll give it to you, for free...my iksars name is cebaak
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 23 2001 at 10:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I dont suppose anyone would be kind enough to give me one of these or let me buy it from them on Drinal for about 3pp?
info
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2001 at 6:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248938001
12 posts
Depending on your race, shestars scaled coif looks like black moose antlers(more than anything else) when equipped. From what ive seen and heard it is pretty decent head gear for new chars. I'm lvl 23 and I just got something new. But all in all shestar's scaled coif was prolly still better than what I've got now. I am just retarded like that.

And from what I remember I trained in blacksmithing(just a few practice points) and it took me several attempts to combine the unfinished with the scales, but a friend of mine didn't train, and well of course he got it on the first try.


Rasic Scalewind
23 Monk
Zeb

# Aug 28 2001 at 4:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595175358723
28 posts
Man, I don't think I seen 1 single message in this post about the Shestar's Scaled Coif. I'm glad I didn't really need any info on it like "what does it look like equipped"? How bout answering me that question and stop flaming each other for a change.

It's always nice to see that you took a dirt nap while AFK for a second.

RE: Coif
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2003 at 3:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1623630270841
251 posts
without luclin graphics it looks awesome.. its a black mask with black wings comingoff the side

no graphics with luclin turned on tho 8(
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 10 2001 at 8:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I agree with the last post on the twinking, but i am curious how or why all these twinking posts got posted under this item, the original Twinking message had no mention of the item that these are posted under
Twinking
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 12:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249737034
3 posts
Giving good stuff to a newbie is fine. One of your characters giving to another of your characters is fine. What is NOT fine is people who go on Ebay and BUY stuff. I saw 10,000 plat going for $50. There were also some high-level items for sale. And there were actually people lined up to lay down their hard-earned RL cash. /boggle. This screws up the EQ economy and it sucks.
▲ Page top
RE: Twinking
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2002 at 1:15 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Amen. It's also a violation of the EULA, and can get you suspended or banned. They can even take legal action in extreme cases if they so choose.
▲ Page top
A final say on "twinking"
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 9:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761680252
10 posts
bah.. all this debate on twinking... SO WHAT??? ya i have twinked chars... but u know what... how do u think they got twinked? let me tell you.. because my main (43 SK) worked his **** off to get to lvl 43.... earned every dang thing he has AND the stuff he's gotten for my twinks... ppl who stay at it long enough to legitly take a lvl 1 char to lvl 40+ or even less for that matter should be ablet o go get a few nice items for there newbie chars that they make to play around with without getting all this BS from ppl about it... sure its easy to get jeolous.. i know i do.. especially when i see a lvl 5 warrior running around in stuff my 43 SK STILL can't get... but u gotta stop and think.. (unless there one of those ebay freaks who pay lots of real money for game items) they more then likely have a char they started at lvl 1 with nothing (just like all u ppl b*tching about the twinks) and worked there lil buts off to get to high lvls so they could go get this stuff for there newbs... I guess all i'm saying is lay off... before u go overboard whining about all the twinks when ur still half naked just try and remember that most of these ppl have gone thru the same crap ur going thru and did the whole "grin & bear it" bit as they slowly worked there way thru it until they were high enough that they COULD go get nice stuff for there other chars... ya we have twinks.... but it took me personally near 6 months of HARD honest ingame work to get so i could have them... ok I've said my piece, I'll shut up now :)

Ariakass: dark knight of the 43rd circle
▲ Page top
RE: A final say on
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2003 at 4:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255467888
185 posts
mind if throw my two cp in? of course not...

what i think of twinking goes like this - should you have items and equipment that you don't need or wish to distribute, then its all fine and dandy. But if you're making your characters with the games best equipment out there, then there is no fun in even grouping. Why group at lvl 2 when you have the fighting power of someone in their mid-teens?

The whole point in Everquest in to grup and interact with others, thats why its a MMORPG! But if you had the power of someone at level 20 when you're hardly even level 3... hell, why group? Oh well, I've been twinked... I'm gonna get twinked again, and i'll twink others... but many twinks seem to lose sight of the struggle of fighitng an orc pawn or a scaled wolf pup and remembering crapping their pants when the pup and yourself had only 5% health left and whoever hit first would win, and you screen would be lined with misses from both sides... that is the fun of being non-twinked...

I know I probably made little to no sense but... that what I think on twinking... it helps you but ruins the game for your teamamtes, should you decide to team up... i remember the hardest thing about twinks is healing them because their HP is so high my spells would hardly do any good and they would get mad at me... oh well, twink at your own risk!!

See you all on E'Ci!! So says Undyingfists
▲ Page top
RE: A final say on
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2003 at 6:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591786335909
1 post
Bah, this is rubbish. Just because you make one character up to 60 doesn't mean that you can give every other character you have a Darkwater helm, Wurmslayer, etc at lvl 1. Now, I'll be the first to say that when rerolling a char, you should be able to transfer equipment...but there is a limit. To me, seeing a level 1 char with banded is not twinking...seeing one with Enchanted Mitril Plate is. Where's the challenge? On my server (FV) this isn't such a big deal, but on PvP servers, sure I understand the complaints about twinks. As for those people who are 'whining about twinking'...what about all of you blithering about how justified you are? Hypocrits.
▲ Page top
RE: A final say on
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2002 at 10:27 AM Rating: Good
Bofor
Scholar
326 posts
I agree with you Ariakass. My two highest characters have won the battles and I have the right to distribute my spoils anyway I see fit. I have even given something on occasion to a complete and total stranger who was discouraged by all the cool looking stuff that others were wearing and he had only tattered armor. It's the nice things that we the players do for each other that counts, not the whining about twinking.
____________________________
Bo knows jewelry.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 28 2001 at 10:34 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) well said!
RE: A final say on
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 9:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246892061
13 posts
Ditto
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 30 2001 at 7:24 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ahhh...twinking isnt so bad...some kind soul twinked me...in turn for the power it gave me, ive twinked like 6 newbies... give a little, get a little...thats what makes eq cool;there are haves and haves nots...a complete economic system of its own...and as far as im concerned, being a def sk is as hard as it gets...twinking is the only real way to have fun!
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 11:46 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) twinking isn't all that bad...some people just give you stuff, no questions asked, like im lvl 14 and at lvl 8 some random guy came up to me and asked if i was twinked i said no, because im not, an he gave me a glowing velium axe 18dmg 38delay... now at that time this was god like an you know how sweet that was...? going from rusty to glowing F@#king velium!
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 11:46 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) twinking isn't all that bad...some people just give you stuff, no questions asked, like im lvl 14 and at lvl 8 some random guy came up to me and asked if i was twinked i said no, because im not, an he gave me a glowing velium axe 18dmg 38delay... now at that time this was god like an you know how sweet that was...? going from rusty to glowing F@#king velium!
